description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front, featuring a black bezel and rounded corners. The front screen displays a colorful grid of app icons, a status bar at the top, and a small notch for the front-facing camera and sensors. The back of the phone is sleek and glossy, finished in solid black, and houses a dual-camera setup positioned vertically in the top left corner. The sides of the phone are slim and appear to be made of a matte or semi-glossy black material, with several physical buttons visible along the right edge. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, typical of high-end smartphones used in urban environments. The device appears to be lightweight, compact, and ergonomically designed for handheld use.
description: A sleek, modern black smartphone with a large touchscreen display, dual rear cameras, and minimal physical buttons. The front features a vibrant app interface, while the back is glossy and unadorned except for the camera module.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with app icons, a status bar, and a small notch for the front camera.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slimness and the presence of physical buttons along the right edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a glossy black surface with a dual-camera module in the top left corner and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the phone's thinness and absence of buttons on this edge.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful home screen with app icons arranged in a grid, a status bar at the top showing time, date, and signal indicators, and a wallpaper with a gradient background. No notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses are vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back of the phone, slightly raised from the surface.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible on the right edge: two smaller buttons likely for volume control and one larger button, probably the power button. No buttons are visible on the left edge or below the screen.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: A slim, black protective case is fitted around the phone, covering the back and sides with cutouts for the camera and buttons. The case appears to be made of matte or semi-glossy plastic or silicone.
